issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1269: remaining Python asset sweep 9/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1269 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The lane was published to origin/big-go-1269 with final tip commit be471d29 after one transient SSL transport failure on the initial push attempt.
`branch.latest_commit` records the stable lane delivery commit rather than later metadata-only sync commits.
